disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset of widespread, intensely itchy, migratory raised welts; individual lesions transient (resolve within a few hours) while new ones erupt elsewhere
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the rash for me?
How has the rash changed since it started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're big itchy welts — raised and pale in the middle with a red ring. The weird thing is each one only lasts a couple of hours then fades, but new ones keep popping up somewhere else. It's moving all around my body.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Ingestion of a new brand of ibuprofen (NSAID) approximately 12 hours before symptom onset — likely pseudoallergic trigger
trigger_question_examples: Have you started any new medications, tablets or painkillers recently?
Did you take anything new in the day or two before this started?
Any new creams, foods, supplements or over-the-counter medicines lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Oh — I did take a new brand of ibuprofen yesterday for some period pain. It was about half a day before the rash came up. I didn't think anything of it.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: No, I don't take any regular medications.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pertinent negatives for anaphylaxis: no shortness of breath, no wheeze or noisy breathing, no lip/tongue/throat swelling, no difficulty swallowing, no vomiting, no dizziness or faintness
trigger_question_examples: Are you having any trouble breathing, or any swelling of your lips, tongue or throat?
Do you feel dizzy, faint, or have any tightness in your throat or chest?
Any vomiting, wheezing, or difficulty swallowing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — my breathing is fine, I can swallow okay, and there's no swelling of my lips or tongue that I can feel or see. I don't feel dizzy or sick in my stomach. It's really just the awful itching and the welts. But I'm so scared it's going to turn into something worse.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'm just so itchy and panicked, I can't tell.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe symptomatic burden and high health anxiety with catastrophic fear of throat closing, but no objective airway or systemic compromise
trigger_question_examples: How are you coping with this — how worried are you feeling?
What's worrying you most about the rash right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm terrified, honestly. The itch is unbearable and I keep thinking my throat is going to swell shut even though it feels okay right now. My partner is panicking too.
